message:
perf: revert extern var to pub var for zero-cost pointer compression

The extern var added 3 extra instructions (memory load + compare + branch)
on every compressPtr/decompressPtr — millions of times per second in TSC.
Since the low-address arena already works (heap_base=0x0, arena at 64GB
within 44-bit range), LLVM can constant-fold the entire check to nothing.
This matches macOS ARM64 behavior: compressPtr becomes a single AND.

Panic at startup if arena is outside 44-bit range as a safety guard.
